_notas: type_definition_id y primary_parent_id vienen en None — se resuelven en tiempo de ejecucion con get_all_types() y con la tabla de correspondencia asset_id_canonical -> ID de OpenPages (pendiente, ver README). Los nombres de campo en FIELD_MAP_VULNERABILITY / FIELD_MAP_ASSET (openpages_mapper.py) son provisionales y deben confirmarse contra el esquema real de produccion de Actinver, no el de demo.

vulnerabilities.name: VUL_AST-aa873e16293d_40275
vulnerabilities.description: Carga automatizada desde Tenable — SSLv3 Padding Oracle On Downgraded Legacy Encryption Vulnerability (POODLE)

fields.name: Description
fields.value: SSLv3 Padding Oracle On Downgraded Legacy Encryption Vulnerability (POODLE)

fields.name: External System - Application Vulnerability:Issue Type
fields.value:
'
Nessus determined that the remote server supports SSLv3 with at least one CBC 
cipher suite, indicating that this server is vulnerable.

It appears that TLSv1 or newer is supported on the server. However, the 
Fallback SCSV mechanism is not supported, allowing connections to be "rolled 
back" to SSLv3.

vulnerabilities.name: VUL_AST-576fc4442e6c_10083
vulnerabilities.description: Carga automatizada desde Tenable — SSL Certificate Signed Using Weak Hashing Algorithm

fields.name: Description
fields.value: SSL Certificate Signed Using Weak Hashing Algorithm

fields.name: External System - Application Vulnerability:Issue Type
fields.value:
'
The following certificates were part of the certificate chain sent by
the remote host, but contain hashes that are considered to be weak.

Subject             : C=US/O=IBM/OU=NodeBEBURSANET/OU=CellBEBURSANET/OU=Root Certificate/CN=S01BEAPPFEPN01
Signature Algorithm : SHA-1 With RSA Encryption
Valid From          : May 05 11:22:12 2015 GMT
Valid To            : May 01 11:22:12 2030 GMT
Raw PEM certificate : 
-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----

-----END CERTIFICATE-----

Subject             : C=US/O=IBM/OU=N01BEBURSANET/OU=CellNEGELEC01/CN=S01BEAPPFEPN01
Signature Algorithm : SHA-1 With RSA Encryption
Valid From          : Apr 19 02:30:31 2026 GMT
Valid To            : Apr 19 02:30:31 2027 GMT
Raw PEM certificate : 
-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----

-----END CERTIFICATE-----

vulnerabilities.name: VUL_AST-576fc4442e6c_10064
vulnerabilities.description: Carga automatizada desde Tenable — SSL Version 2 and 3 Protocol Detection

fields.name: External System - Application Vulnerability:Issue Type
fields.value:
'
- SSLv3 is enabled and the server supports at least one cipher.
	Explanation: TLS 1.0 and SSL 3.0 cipher suites may be used with SSLv3


  Medium Strength Ciphers (> 64-bit and < 112-bit key, or 3DES)

    Name                          Code             KEX           Auth     Encryption             MAC
    ----------------------        ----------       ---           ----     ---------------------  ---
    DES-CBC3-SHA(FIPS)                             RSA           RSA      3DES-CBC(168)          SHA1
    EDH-RSA-DES-CBC3-SHA                           DHE           RSA      3DES-CBC(168)          SHA1
    DES-CBC3-SHA                                   RSA           RSA      3DES-CBC(168)          SHA1

  High Strength Ciphers (>= 112-bit key)

    Name                          Code             KEX           Auth     Encryption             MAC
    ----------------------        ----------       ---           ----     ---------------------  ---
    DHE-RSA-AES128-SHA                             DHE           RSA      AES-CBC(128)           SHA1
    DHE-RSA-AES256-SHA                             DHE           RSA      AES-CBC(256)           SHA1
    AES128-SHA                                     RSA           RSA      AES-CBC(128)           SHA1
    AES256-SHA                                     RSA           RSA      AES-CBC(256)           SHA1
    RC4-MD5                                        RSA           RSA      RC4(128)               MD5
    RC4-SHA                                        RSA           RSA      RC4(128)               SHA1

The fields above are :

  {Tenable ciphername}
  {Cipher ID code}
  Kex={key exchange}
  Auth={authentication}
  Encrypt={symmetric encryption method}
  MAC={message authentication code}
  {export flag}

vulnerabilities.name: VUL_AST-db41b2c9198c_3389
vulnerabilities.description: Carga automatizada desde Tenable — SSL/TLS Diffie-Hellman Modulus <= 1024 Bits (Logjam)

fields.name: External System - Application Vulnerability:Issue Type
fields.value:
'
Vulnerable connection combinations :

  SSL/TLS version  : TLSv1.0
  Cipher suite     : TLS1_DHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA
  Diffie-Hellman MODP size (bits) : 1024
    Warning - This is a known static Oakley Group2 modulus. This may make
    the remote host more vulnerable to the Logjam attack.
  Logjam attack difficulty : Hard (would require nation-state resources)

  SSL/TLS version  : TLSv1.0
  Cipher suite     : TLS1_DHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA
  Diffie-Hellman MODP size (bits) : 1024
    Warning - This is a known static Oakley Group2 modulus. This may make
    the remote host more vulnerable to the Logjam attack.
  Logjam attack difficulty : Hard (would require nation-state resources)

  SSL/TLS version  : TLSv1.0
  Cipher suite     : TLS1_DHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA
  Diffie-Hellman MODP size (bits) : 1024
    Warning - This is a known static Oakley Group2 modulus. This may make
    the remote host more vulnerable to the Logjam attack.
  Logjam attack difficulty : Hard (would require nation-state resources)

  SSL/TLS version  : TLSv1.0
  Cipher suite     : TLS1_DHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA
  Diffie-Hellman MODP size (bits) : 1024
    Warning - This is a known static Oakley Group2 modulus. This may make
    the remote host more vulnerable to the Logjam attack.
  Logjam attack difficulty : Hard (would require nation-state resources)

  SSL/TLS version  : TLSv1.0
  Cipher suite     : TLS1_DHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_CBC_SHA
  Diffie-Hellman MODP size (bits) : 1024
    Warning - This is a known static Oakley Group2 modulus. This may make
    the remote host more vulnerable to the Logjam attack.
  Logjam attack difficulty : Hard (would require nation-state resources)

  SSL/TLS version  : TLSv1.0
  Cipher suite     : TLS1_DHE_RSA_WITH_AES_256_CBC_SHA
  Diffie-Hellman MODP size (bits) : 1024
    Warning - This is a known static Oakley Group2 modulus. This may make
    the remote host more vulnerable to the Logjam attack.
  Logjam attack difficulty : Hard (would require nation-state resources)
